plan.failureSummary: The test failed during a deterministic execution because it attempted to click a close button (×) that could not be resolved on the current page. This element was likely part of a cached interaction (e.g., dismissing a banner) that is no longer present or has changed structure.
observedIndicators: selectorFailedDuringPageAi === false (incorrectly reported by heuristic, actually failed in tool call)
Failure screenshot shows homepage but tool call attempted interaction with a likely transient element (× button)
History shows a mixed pass rate, suggesting intermittent UI elements or stale cache issues

remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache for this test and re-run. The autonomous agent should naturally navigate the updated UI or ignore the missing close button.

plan.notes: The failure screenshot shows the homepage with a banner, but the cached sequence tried to click an '×' button that isn't findable. Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to re-evaluate the page and proceed with the 'Resources' menu navigation.
